tasks.title: Setup project repo & folder structure
tasks.description: Initialize repo with /backend and /mobile directories, package.json, .gitignore, .env.example, README.md

tasks.title: Setup Raspberry Pi infrastructure
tasks.description: Install Node.js 18, PM2, Nginx, configure reverse proxy, Let's Encrypt SSL, dynamic DNS (DuckDNS), enable 2GB swap, configure PM2 auto-start

tasks.title: Build JSON Database Manager module
tasks.description: Reusable module: CRUD on JSON files, unique IDs, in-memory caching (node-cache), index files for fast lookups, Haversine proximity search, daily automated backups via cron, file-based indexing

tasks.title: Create /data folder structure
tasks.description: Create all JSON data lake directories: /users, /matches, /messages, /proposals, /groups, /swipes, /reports, /indexes, /backups, /analytics, /uploads

tasks.title: Express.js server setup with middleware
tasks.description: Create main server file: Express app, CORS, rate limiting (100 req/15min), Joi input validation, XSS protection, JWT middleware, error handling, health check endpoint, static file serving for uploads

tasks.title: Auth routes: register, login, logout, me
tasks.description: POST /api/auth/register (email+password, bcrypt 10 rounds, JWT 7-day), POST /api/auth/login, POST /api/auth/logout, GET /api/auth/me. Store in /users/{id}.json, index in /indexes/user_by_email.json

tasks.title: User profile CRUD routes
tasks.description: GET/PUT /api/users/profile, POST /api/users/photos (multer+sharp, resize+compress, thumbnails), DELETE /api/users/photos/:id, PUT /api/users/preferences. Store photos in /uploads/users/{id}/

tasks.title: Tunisian neighborhoods & constants data
tasks.description: Create constants file with: Tunis neighborhoods list (12 areas with lat/lon coords), budget ranges (Low<30TND, Medium 30-80, High>80), activity types (6 categories), relationship intentions, gender options

tasks.title: Matching algorithm implementation
tasks.description: Smart matching: 50km radius via Haversine, filter by gender pref/age range/existing swipes/active users, score by shared activities (highest weight)/shared interests/intention compat/distance/profile completeness/recent activity. Return top 20 sorted.

tasks.title: Swipe routes & match detection
tasks.description: GET /api/matches/discover (potential matches), POST /api/matches/swipe (record like/pass in /swipes/{user_id}_swipes.json), mutual like detection → create /matches/{match_id}.json, update /indexes/active_matches.json, trigger OneSignal notification

tasks.title: Match list & unmatch routes
tasks.description: GET /api/matches (user's matches with profile previews), DELETE /api/matches/:id (unmatch, remove from index, clean up conversation)

tasks.title: Socket.io real-time chat server
tasks.description: Socket.io setup with JWT auth, events: message:send, message:receive, message:read, typing:start, typing:stop, user:online, user:offline. Store messages in /messages/conversation_{match_id}.json. Only matched users can chat.

tasks.title: Chat HTTP fallback routes
tasks.description: GET /api/chat/conversations (list all), GET /api/chat/:conversationId/messages (history with pagination), POST /api/chat/:conversationId/messages (HTTP fallback send)

tasks.title: Date proposal creation & storage
tasks.description: POST /api/proposals — form: activity type, date (future only), time, neighborhood, budget range, suggested place, notes. Store in /proposals/{proposal_id}.json with status: pending. Send push notification to recipient.

tasks.title: Proposal response flow (accept/decline/modify)
tasks.description: PUT /api/proposals/:id/accept (create confirmed date in /confirmed_dates/), PUT /api/proposals/:id/decline, PUT /api/proposals/:id/modify (counter-proposal with modification history). Push notifications for each action.

tasks.title: Smart suggestions with OpenStreetMap
tasks.description: GET /api/proposals/suggestions/:matchId — show shared activities, for each suggest 2-3 places via Overpass API (cafes, restaurants, parks), calculate distance from both users via Haversine, return name/address/distance. Use Nominatim for geocoding.

tasks.title: Proposal list route
tasks.description: GET /api/proposals/:matchId — list all proposals for a match with status and history

tasks.title: Group activities CRUD
tasks.description: POST /api/groups (create: activity type, title, desc, date, location, group size, looking for X more, visibility, age range, gender pref), GET /api/groups (browse with filters), GET /api/groups/:id. Store in /groups/{group_id}.json.

tasks.title: Group join/approve flow & group chat
tasks.description: POST /api/groups/:id/join (request), PUT /api/groups/:id/approve/:userId (creator approves), group Socket.io chat events, GET /api/groups/:id/messages. Store group messages in /group_messages/{group_id}.json.

tasks.title: Safety: report system
tasks.description: POST /api/safety/report — reasons: inappropriate behavior, fake profile, harassment, scam. Optional evidence upload. Store in /reports/{report_id}.json. Admin review queue endpoint.

tasks.title: Safety: block system
tasks.description: POST /api/safety/block (block user, unmatch, remove from discovery), GET /api/safety/blocked, DELETE /api/safety/block/:userId. Store blocked IDs in user JSON. Filter blocked users from all queries.

tasks.title: OneSignal push notification integration
tasks.description: Setup OneSignal free tier, create backend SDK integration, send notifications for: new matches, new messages, date proposals, group invites, proposal responses. Configure for iOS + Android.

tasks.title: Analytics tracking module
tasks.description: Track in /analytics/daily_{date}.json: DAU, new registrations, matches created, proposals created/accepted (conversion rate), messages sent, group activities created, avg time match→first proposal

tasks.title: Daily backup automation
tasks.description: Cron job to backup /data to /backups/{date}/, compress old backups, cleanup backups older than 30 days, log backup status

tasks.title: Test data generator (50-100 fake profiles)
tasks.description: Script to generate fake user profiles with varied locations across Tunis, ages 18-35, activity preferences, placeholder photos. Test matching algorithm, proposals, groups.

tasks.title: React Native app setup with Expo
tasks.description: Initialize Expo project, install dependencies: react-native-paper, react-navigation, redux toolkit, react-native-maps, socket.io-client, onesignal-sdk. Configure for iOS + Android.

tasks.title: Mobile: Auth screens (Login, Register, OTP)
tasks.description: Build login screen, register screen, email verification flow. JWT token storage, auto-login on app launch, logout functionality.

tasks.title: Mobile: Profile creation wizard (5 steps)
tasks.description: Step 1: basic info (name, age, gender, GPS location). Step 2: photo upload (3-6). Step 3: relationship intention. Step 4: activity preferences (2-4). Step 5: bio & interests.

tasks.title: Mobile: Discover swipe cards
tasks.description: Tinder-style card stack, swipe right/left animations, show photos/age/distance/shared activities/bio. 60 FPS, pull-to-refresh. Optimistic UI for swipes.

tasks.title: Mobile: Matches list screen
tasks.description: List all matches with profile previews, last message preview, online status, unread count. Tap to open chat or proposal.

tasks.title: Mobile: Real-time chat screen
tasks.description: Socket.io chat UI: message bubbles, typing indicator, read receipts, online/offline status, message history scroll, push notifications for new messages.

tasks.title: Mobile: Date proposal creation screen
tasks.description: Prominent 'Suggest a Plan' button (bigger than chat). Form: activity type, calendar date picker, time picker, neighborhood dropdown, budget range, place search, notes. Smart suggestions from shared activities.

tasks.title: Mobile: Proposal view & response screen
tasks.description: View proposal details, accept/decline/modify buttons, modification form, status indicators, confirmation animation on accept.

tasks.title: Mobile: Groups tab & browse
tasks.description: Scrollable group activity cards, filter by type/date/location/distance, show creator info, participant count, join request button.

tasks.title: Mobile: Group create, detail & group chat
tasks.description: Create group form, group detail view with members, approve/decline join requests (creator), group chat screen with Socket.io.

tasks.title: Mobile: Profile & settings screens
tasks.description: View/edit own profile, preferences, safety center, blocked users list, help/safety tips page, community guidelines, logout.

tasks.title: Mobile: OpenStreetMap integration
tasks.description: react-native-maps with OSM tiles, Nominatim place search with autocomplete, distance display, map markers for date locations.

tasks.title: Redux state management setup
tasks.description: Configure Redux Toolkit slices: auth, profile, matches, chat, proposals, groups, safety. Persist auth state. Optimistic updates for swipes and messages.

tasks.title: UI/UX polish: colors, typography, components
tasks.description: Apply design system: primary blue/purple, secondary coral/orange CTAs, success green, light gray background, dark gray text. React Native Paper theming. Activity icons throughout.

tasks.title: End-to-end testing all flows
tasks.description: Test: registration→profile→discover→swipe→match→chat→proposal→accept/decline→groups→join→group chat→report→block. Fix all bugs found.

tasks.title: Performance optimization (RPi focused)
tasks.description: Optimize JSON file reads with caching, implement log rotation, image lazy loading, Nginx static file caching, PM2 memory limit 1GB, graceful error handling, <500ms API avg response.

tasks.title: API documentation
tasks.description: Document all endpoints with request/response examples, auth requirements, error codes. Include Socket.io events documentation.

tasks.title: Deployment & launch prep
tasks.description: Final deploy to RPi, verify SSL/DNS, test public URL, app icons & splash screens, privacy policy, terms of service, build iOS TestFlight + Android APK, submission prep.
